name: Swiss Steak
recipeIngredient: 2 pounds beef round steak, about 1 inch thick
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut the steak into 4 serving pieces.
2. Dredge each piece in a mixture of flour and salt.
3. Place the dredged steak pieces in the crockpot.
4. Add chopped celery, carrots, and onions to the pot.
5. Stir in Worcestershire sauce and tomato sauce.
6. Pour the remaining tomato sauce over the meat and vegetables.
7. Cover and cook on low setting for 8 to 10 hours, or until tender.
